title: Expanded Cave Mod
description: This mod adds some new ores to Minecraft!
body:
# Expanded Cave Mod
Welcome to the Expanded Cave Mod, an exciting expansion that transforms your underground exploration experience in Minecraft. This mod introduces a variety of new ores and features that make caving adventures more rewarding and thrilling. With new resources and challenges to discover, your journey through the depths will never be the same.

## New Ores
### Ruby Ore:

Appearance: Vibrant red ore with a metallic sheen.

Location: Found deep underground in the Overworld, especially in cave systems.

Spawn Levels: Ruby Ore spawns between Y 0 and Y 64.

Properties: Ruby Ore can be smelted into Rubies, which are used to craft robust tools and armor with a stunning red glow. Ruby tools are known for their durability and efficiency, while Ruby armor offers increased protection and fire resistance.

### Netherite Ore:

Appearance: Dark, ancient-looking ore with a mysterious aura.

Location: Found in the treacherous depths of the Nether, often near lava pools.

Spawn Levels: Netherite Ore spawns between Y 0 and Y 64.

Properties: When mined, Netherite Ore directly drops a Netherite Ingot. Netherite tools and armor are the most durable and powerful in the game, offering unmatched strength and resistance to knockback.

## Quests and Achievements
Wait, This is in the game now?: Achieve this by mining a Netherite Ore. Discover the wonder and power of this incredible new addition to your Minecraft world.
